objective: Complete the commercial conversation shell before submitting another real product task. Preserve the existing OpenClaw provider, ORIS control plane and Codex execution chain, while adding clear conversation navigation, new-conversation creation, history visibility and safe archive/delete controls.

diagnosis.current_ui: custom ORIS conversation-first shell backed by the OpenClaw provider
diagnosis.session_model: single 30-day HttpOnly cookie automatically reuses one server-side session
diagnosis.observed_effect: old failed messages remain in the reused session and the operator cannot clearly switch, archive or clear conversation history

product_decision.target_experience: OpenClaw-like conversation shell with ORIS task cards
product_decision.history_storage: server-side runtime state, excluded from Git

required_ux_capabilities: conversation titles derived from the first meaningful user goal
updated time and task status in conversation list
delete or clear only conversations without an active task
prevent deletion of a conversation with a queued or running task
preserve task and evidence history for completed work

controlled_real_task.operator_message: 给 oris-final-acceptance-api 增加一个只读 GET /capabilities 接口，返回 service、storage 和 features 三个字段；features 至少包含 task_crud、filtering 和 stats。补充 pytest 覆盖接口状态码和字段契约，更新 README 的 API 列表，运行 py_compile 和 pytest，完成后提交并推送。不要修改 ORIS 平台代码或任何密钥。

next_action: Implement and server-test the conversation history UX and session-management API without submitting a real product task. Then request a browser test for new conversation, history switching and safe archive/delete before resuming the controlled /capabilities task.
blocked_reason: commercial browser experience lacks explicit session history and lifecycle controls
